name: Hasselback Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and place them in a large spoon to slice at 1/4-inch intervals. The spoon will prevent cutting all the way through the potato.
2. As you work, put the sliced potatoes in cold, salted water to prevent discoloration.
3. Drain the potatoes and pat them dry with paper towels.
4. Arrange the cut-side up in a large buttered baking dish.
5. Gently baste the potatoes with butter.
6. Sprinkle with salt.
7. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 30 minutes.
8. Baste with remaining butter and sprinkle bread crumbs over each potato.
9. Continue to bake for an additional 15 minutes or until golden brown and tender.
10. Add a sprinkle of Parmesan cheese five minutes before the potatoes are done.
